text.message: hey Nexus, are you streaming this game or uploading it later?
are you streaming on twitch or going to upload it to youtube later?
I don't want to stream snipe you
you've helped me a lot with my game play.  Your videos are really insightful
Hey Nexus, on this board, did I make the right placement for my initial settlements? I wasn't sure if the dev route was the right play or not. What are your thoughts?
I don't understand what that means? Was that in one of your most recent videos?
I mean, a quick google search would show top 10 in the US. I can understand why
Try google, I don’t know this dude
That's unfortunate. I'm a Largest Army member on your patreon.
Type the url and they’ll know if does t exist
I've paid for a few coaching sessions from you but you've cancelled in preparation for nationals
but I understand. You shut out your qualifiers with 50 points so you're in a really solid spot for nationals so I can get why you'd rather practice with better people :-/
Guys. I don't think you should team up against Nexus. I know he's really good and knows how to get points fast late game based on his videos but it's not fair.
This guy is hilarious.  I, just a random dude
I'm sorry. I am still newer so I thought I hit pass. Doesn't the space bar pass?
I'll try to focus more. It's not all of the time I get to play with someone like Nexus. I'm just trying to get better but I guess I'm a little star struck.
I'm confused how this game is still going on?
